highlights.text: I wrote last Wednesday at 4pm: “My general lean is ES can try some back-testing.
I wrote on Friday at 4pm: “My general lean is bulls can try to do some backtesting with 6913, 6925, 6935/42 next up.
I wrote yesterday at the close: “My general lean is to defer to the trend.
Bulls want to hold 6943-45 in a strong bull case (or quick trap down to 6925).
As always, the cause of yesterdays green day was not a surprise and it was caused by the same thing that causes every green day in ES: My core setup, the Failed Breakdown.
In today’s newsletter I’ll talk this, I’ll do a deep dive into some of the multitude of Failed Breakdowns we had last week/Friday (including the one that caused the rip from Friday into today.).

post_title: 2026 Starts With A Squeeze For SPX. Can Bulls Keep It Going? January 7th Plan
